name: Rainfed Area Development
benefit_description: The scheme targets to provide following benefits: 1)	Enhanced agriculture productivity and overall remuneration in the rainfed areas. 2)	Risk mitigation against climatic stress such as droughts and heat stress and crop failure. 3)	Conservation of natural resources by soil fertility conservation, rai
details: Rainfed Area Development (RAD) scheme was launched in 2014-15 to mainstream development of rainfed areas in a sustainable manner. It adopts an area-based approach, focuses on Integrated Farming System (IFS) for enhancing productivity and minimizing risks associated with climatic variability. Under this system, crops/ cropping system is integrated with activities like horticulture, livestock, fishery, agro-forestry, apiculture etc. to enable farmers not only in maximizing farm returns for sustain
eligibility_text: All farmers are eligible under the scheme.
